prompt: Tap co as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep action order clear before a track-specific action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The cutoff is the right seat anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the last pressure seat before the button takes over.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The cutoff is the right position anchor because late-position cash pressure changes once you know who can apply pressure with the informational edge.
